content.en:
The source sea life devours the source dragon, Ye Tian has also heard of it, this is a very rare source sea life, adulthood is the supreme realm, and it can even devour the exotic world, but few people have seen it.

Besides, if he really encountered the Devouring Source Dragon, he couldn't escape from any of the dares to hunt and kill.

As for the Void Source Crystal, it was also an incomparably rare treasure, only some special treasures in the Source Sea would be born, and he didn't know where this kind of treasure was.

"Condense the Void Source Body!"

Ye Tian stared at this task, and his heart was a little moved.

Although he didn't know what the Void Source Body was, the reward was very rich, a full 30,000 points.

In other words, the Void Source Body is very important.

"Let's go back first, ask the Heavenly Wind Source God, maybe he knows what the Void Source Body is!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, before leaving, he applied to participate in the Void Source Monument, but after the 22nd Great Tribulation, it can be seen how many children of the void want to comprehend the Void Source Monument.

After becoming the Son of the Void, Ye Tian had already obtained the badge of the Son of the Void, through which he could enter the Void Source Hall or easily leave the Void Source Hall.

He can even use the badge to condense a temporary token for others to participate in the Void Child's assessment.

And the Heavenly Wind Source God gave him a token and let him enter the Void Source Hall to participate in the assessment.

Obviously, the Heavenly Wind Source God must also be a child of the void.

Wow!

Ye Tian left the Void Source Hall and returned to the Heavenly Wind Sea.

The moment the Heavenly Wind Source God saw Ye Tian, he knew that Ye Tian had succeeded.

The Son of the Void and the Son of the Void are sensitive, and he can sense the breath of the Son of the Void badge on Ye Tian's body, so Ye Tian must have become the Son of the Void.

"Ye Tian, congratulations!"

The Heavenly Wind Source God congratulated.

"Thank you, Chief!" Ye Tian said gratefully.

"You have just become a child of the void, I'm afraid there are many things you don't know well, if you want to know anything, you can ask me. After a while, I'm going to go into retreat, and if you want to ask me, I can't answer you!" said with a smile.

Ye Tian hurriedly asked, "Chief, I want to know what the Void Source Body is, and I actually asked the Void Source Hall to give a reward of 30,000 points!"

"Void Source Body!" Heavenly Wind Source God said regretfully: "You can treat it as an incomparably powerful Void Body, but unfortunately it must be condensed into a Void Source Body when you are a third-class invincible, otherwise it will be too late by the time you become a second-class invincible and begin to merge with the Flesh Body and Soul Body." It is precisely because of this that many children of the void have stayed in the realm of third-class invincibles so far, just wanting to fight. For example, the son of the Void who fought against Luo Ge before, he also wanted to condense the Void Source Body, so he never hit the realm of the second-rank invincible. "

"As for how to cultivate the Void Source Body, there are no cultivation techniques, only the Void Source Tablet, which can make people comprehend all kinds of eternal rules, and can also make people perfect the invincible body. The most powerful invincible body robber in the Tianlin Realm is only the top invincible body robber, just like the Wanyuan Returning Ruins Body that you cultivated, it is actually a Void Son who comprehended a body robbery through the Void Source Tablet, but unfortunately it is far from reaching the standard of the Void Source Body, and it can be regarded as a failure in creation. "

"According to our speculation, in order to create a Void Source Body, one must comprehend enough eternal rules, and each eternal rule must reach a very high and profound realm, which requires accumulating enough points in the third-rank invincible realm to comprehend the Void Source Monument, and it is extremely difficult to obtain points now. In our Tianlin Realm, so far, only Lord Akiba Genzu has condensed the Void Source Body, and it is with the help of the other two Supreme Beings that he has accumulated a large number of points, and it is said that he has killed a large number of Devouring Source Dragons, but now there is no such opportunity. "

After the Heavenly Wind Source God explained, Ye Tian finally knew the power of the Void Source Body, which was far beyond the Void Source Body.

Perhaps after condensing the Void Source Body, he could hope to pass through the second layer of the Void Tower and become the Void God Son.

Subsequently, he left the Tianfeng Sea.

Right now, he still needs 22 Great Tribulation Epochs before he can go to the Void Source Monument.

He has a huge advantage over other Void Sons in that he has an eternal talent, and there is much more than one subject.

Through his eternal talent, he was countless times faster than others in comprehending the rules of eternity, so he might only need to spend a small amount of points to condense the Void Source Body.

Of course, the more eternal talent he acquired, the greater the hope of condensing the Void Source Body.

"At the moment, I don't have a Time Eternal Ancestral Fu, it seems that I have to spend a lot of time copying the Time Ultimate Ancestral Fu, and through a large number of Time Ultimate Ancestral Fu, I will be able to fuse it into the Time Eternal Ancestral Fu!" Ye Tian muttered.

So, he used the information of Tianfeng Sea to inquire about the existence of the Time Ultimate Ancestor Fu, and it turned out that there were really some beings who had the Time Ultimate Ancestor Fu.

Some of the beings are Origin Sea Beings, and some are races from other eternal heaven and earth.

Ye Tian was able to travel through the Void Source Palace, so he could save countless hours.

As the years passed, Ye Tian broke through all parts of the Source Sea again and again, and some dangers also occurred, and even broke into many Jedi by death, copying his body and dying many times, but compared to the harvest, it was not worth mentioning.

Before you know it, a great tribulation has passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian copied enough Time Ultimate Ancestral Fu, and fused these Time Ultimate Ancestral Fu together, and finally completed the transformation.

【Eternal Ancestral Endowment: Time】

"It worked!"

Ye Tian was very excited, he had obtained the Space Eternal Ancestral Endowment before, and now he had obtained the Time Eternal Ancestral Endowment, plus other Eternal Ancestral Endowments, he already had a lot of Eternal Ancestral Endowments.

However, Ye Tian did not stop at these eternal ancestral endowments.

He continued to collect other rare Ultimate Ancestral Endowments, striving to obtain more Eternal Ancestral Endowments.

In this way, one great tribulation after another passed.

Ye Tian's strength has not improved much, after all, he has almost improved to the extreme at the level of a third-rank invincible, but his combat experience has improved a lot.

He often goes to the Void Tower to fight, and hone his battle awareness and battle rhythm by breaking into the second layer of the Void Tower.

As a result, his current combat experience is gradually approaching that of a child of the void like Rogo.

this day.

Ye Tian rushed to the Void Source Hall, and it was the main body that entered the Void Source Hall.

He applied to participate in the Void Source Monument, and now he is in line.
